闲管家虚拟货源标准接口
  1. 订单接口
闲管家虚拟货源标准接口
  • 接入说明
  • 虚拟货源-自研系统接入
  • 基础接口
    • 查询平台信息
      POST
    • 查询商户信息
      POST
  • 商品接口
    • 查询商品列表
      POST
    • 查询商品详情
      POST
    • 查询商品订阅列表
      POST
    • 订阅商品变更通知
      POST
    • 取消商品变更通知
      POST
  • 订单接口
    • 创建直充订单
      POST
    • 创建卡密订单
      POST
    • 创建券码订单
      POST
    • 查询订单详情
      POST
  • 退款接口
    • 券码订单退款申请
      POST
    • 券码订单退款通知
      POST
  • 回调接口
    • 商品回调通知
      POST
    • 订单回调通知
      POST
    • 券码回调通知
      POST
  1. 订单接口

创建直充订单

云端 Mock
https://m1.apifoxmock.com/m1/5001206-0-default
云端 Mock
https://m1.apifoxmock.com/m1/5001206-0-default
POST
/goofish/order/recharge/create

请求参数

Query 参数

Body 参数application/json

示例
{
    "order_no": "1929063817978999932",
    "goods_no": "12344532",
    "biz_content": {
        "account": "13800138000",
        "game_name": "王者荣耀",
        "game_role": "貂蝉",
        "game_area": "A区",
        "game_server": "国服",
        "buyer_ip": "113.87.236.130",
        "buyer_area": "深圳市"
    },
    "buy_quantity": 1,
    "max_amount": 1000,
    "notify_url": "https://open.goofish.pro/api/open/callback/virtual/order/notify/{token}",
    "biz_order_no": "string",
    "product_id": 0,
    "product_sku": 0,
    "item_id": 0
}

返回响应

🟢200成功
application/json
Body

示例
{
    "code": 0,
    "msg": "OK",
    "data": {
        "order_no": "1929063817978999932",
        "out_order_no": "API2024123012834901444",
        "order_status": 10,
        "order_amount": 1000,
        "goods_name": "【自动充值】哔哩哔哩大会员『7天』",
        "order_time": 1725349041,
        "end_time": 1723870189,
        "ticket_items": [
            {
                "code_no": "12347812478@qq.com",
                "code_pwd": "jah12ni12ie8n111kji",
                "code_name": "string",
                "code_type": 1,
                "valid_start_time": 0,
                "valid_end_time": 0,
                "use_time": 0,
                "revoke_time": 0,
                "status": 1
            }
        ],
        "remark": "这里是创建订单失败的原因"
    }
}
🟢200失败
